title: salix sericeocinerea f. lanata
intro: Salix sericeocinerea f. lanata, also known as woolly silver willow, is a shrub-like willow plant that belongs to the Salicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the woolly silver willow are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
